ctxMarket: Attention is on Solana's transaction volume, which has surpassed Ethereum with 25.3 billion transactions. Discussions also highlight both chains’ exposure to potential quantum computing risks and the rollout of new Solana-based financial products.
ctxTalking:
• Solana’s transaction throughput outpacing Ethereum and fueling speculation about a SOL/ETH breakout
• Security concerns as Coinbase flags proof-of-stake chains like Solana and Ethereum as vulnerable to future quantum computing
• New Solana-based offerings, including pre-IPO tokens and $0 USDT conversions, expanding access to traditional and crypto assets
ctxMatters:
High transaction volumes reinforce Solana’s position as a high-performance chain, attracting developers and financial products.  
Quantum risk discussions could influence future protocol upgrades and user trust.  
Expanding fiat and asset onramps on Solana may drive broader adoption and new use cases.
ctxSignal:
Signal: Solana’s transaction growth and new product integrations signal ongoing ecosystem expansion.  
Noise: Short-term price moves tied to announcements without clear long-term impact.
ctxGlossary:
Slot — The smallest unit of time in Solana’s consensus, used to schedule transactions  
Pre-IPO token — A token representing shares in a private company before it goes public  
Quantum risk — The potential for quantum computers to break current cryptographic protections

readMore.title: Solana outpaces Ethereum with 25.3B transactions – Will SOL/ETH finally react?
Coinbase Flags Proof-of-Stake Chains Like Ethereum, Solana as Potential Quantum Risks
How P2P.org Built a Solana Transaction Sender for Teams That Cannot Afford to Miss a Slot
